channel.title: Two-Pointer Algorithms on Tech Tutorials
channel.description: Recent content in Two-Pointer Algorithms on Tech Tutorials

item.title: Fast and Slow Pointers
item.description: What the learner will walk away with after this chapter.

item.title: Same Direction Pointers
item.description: What the learner will walk away with after this chapter.

item.title: Opposite Direction Pointers
item.description: What the learner will walk away with after this chapter.

item.title: Chapter 3 — Removing Duplicates from Sorted Arrays
item.description: The classic in-place dedupe problem solved with the read/write two-pointer variant.

item.title: Chapter 2 — Reversing & Palindromes
item.description: Apply two pointers to strings: reversal in place and palindrome checking.

item.title: Chapter 1 — The Two-Pointer Mental Model
item.description: Build intuition for why two coordinated indices are so powerful on sorted data.
